description: The `Animation` component represents a generic animation wrapper that can apply various animations to its children.

animation.description: The animation object to be applied to the component

animateWhenInView.description: Indicates whether the animation should start when the component is in view

duration.description: The duration of the animation in milliseconds

once.description: Indicates whether the animation should only run once

reverse.description: Indicates whether the animation should run in reverse after the normal animation completes

loop.description: Indicates whether the animation should loop

delay.description: The delay before the animation starts in milliseconds

started.description: Event fired when the animation starts

stopped.description: Event fired when the animation stops

description: The `FadeAnimation` component represents an animation that fades the content with adjustable opacity values.

from.description: Sets the initial opacity of the content.If the `to` property is not set, the initial opacity set here will be used as the final opacity.

to.description: Sets the final opacity of the content.If the `from` property is not set, the initial opacity set here will be used as the final opacity.

animateWhenInView.description: Indicates whether the animation should start when the component is in view

duration.description: The duration of the animation in milliseconds

reverse.description: Indicates whether the animation should run in reverse

loop.description: Indicates whether the animation should loop

delay.description: The delay before the animation starts in milliseconds

started.description: Event fired when the animation starts

stopped.description: Event fired when the animation stops

description: The `FadeInAnimation` component represents an animation that fades in the content.

animateWhenInView.description: Indicates whether the animation should start when the component is in view

duration.description: The duration of the animation in milliseconds

reverse.description: Indicates whether the animation should run in reverse

loop.description: Indicates whether the animation should loop

delay.description: The delay before the animation starts in milliseconds

started.description: Event fired when the animation starts

stopped.description: Event fired when the animation stops

description: The `FadeOutAnimation` component represents an animation that fades out the content.

animateWhenInView.description: Indicates whether the animation should start when the component is in view

duration.description: The duration of the animation in milliseconds

reverse.description: Indicates whether the animation should run in reverse

loop.description: Indicates whether the animation should loop

delay.description: The delay before the animation starts in milliseconds

started.description: Event fired when the animation starts

stopped.description: Event fired when the animation stops

description: The `ScaleAnimation` component represents an animation that scales the content.

from.description: The initial scale of the content.

to.description: The final scale of the content.

duration.description: The duration of the animation in milliseconds.

animateWhenInView.description: Indicates whether the animation should start when the component is in view.

reverse.description: Indicates whether the animation should run in reverse

loop.description: Indicates whether the animation should loop

delay.description: The delay before the animation starts in milliseconds

started.description: Event fired when the animation starts

stopped.description: Event fired when the animation stops

description: The `SlideInAnimation` component represents an animation that slides in the content from the left.

duration.description: The duration of the animation in milliseconds.

animateWhenInView.description: Indicates whether the animation should start when the component is in view.

reverse.description: Indicates whether the animation should run in reverse

loop.description: Indicates whether the animation should loop

delay.description: The delay before the animation starts in milliseconds

started.description: Event fired when the animation starts

stopped.description: Event fired when the animation stops
